working_on: Issue close-out campaign session S-C: health-check audit posture overhaul. Authors ADR 0057 (adversarial stance for project health-check audits), rewrites engine/operations/health-check.md and docs/health-checks/TEMPLATE.md to add user-buffered execution, freshness probes, posture inversion, and pushback/lesson drawer querying. Closes Issues #30 #28 #36.
declared_scope: Resolve Issues #30, #28, #36: author engine/adr/0057-adversarial-stance-for-health-check-audits.md (sibling to ADR 0040) committing user-buffered execution + posture inversion + stats-as-proxy anti-pattern + ≥1-retire-candidate requirement + cold-context probe; rewrite engine/operations/health-check.md adding adversarial stance, freshness probes per external system (MemPalace/validator/Supabase/hooks/registries), adversarial posture-section rewrites, and an Accumulated-pushbacks-and-lessons section with concrete mempalace_search commands; rewrite docs/health-checks/TEMPLATE.md adding Freshness probes, adversarial posture prompt-questions, Accumulated pushbacks/lessons, Affirmative retire candidates, and User adjudication subsections; author engine/build_readiness/adversarial_stance_first_exercise.md per ADR 0053; light handshake edits to ADR 0040 See-also, engine/adr/README.md, engine/build_readiness/README.md, CLAUDE.md.
